title: gahnia rodwayi
intro: Gahnia rodwayi, also known as Rodway's saw-sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gahnia rodwayi include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe irritated skin. Gahnia rodwayi can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
